text:
The Greed Island Tutorial (Ｇ.Ｉちゅとりある, G.I Chutoriaru) is an omake segment shown at the end of each episode during the Greed Island arc of the 2011 anime adaptation.

Overview

The Greed Island Tutorial segments detail how the game of Greed Island is played. The omake is hosted by the chibi versions of Gon and Killua on a table.

Episodes

Episode 59: The game's memory card
Episode 60: The game's playing card and spell
Episode 61: The "Return" spell card
Episode 62: The "Eye of God" spell card
Episode 63: The "Blue Planet" spell card
Episode 64: The "Leave" spell card
Episode 65: The "Blackout Curtain" spell card
Episode 66: The "Lottery" spell card
Episode 67: The "Tax Collector's Gauntlet" restricted slot card
Episode 68: The "Paladin's Necklace" restricted slot card
Episode 69: The "Accompany" spell card
Episode 70: The "Contact" spell card
Episode 71: The "Clone" spell card
Episode 72: The "Fake" spell card
Episode 73: The "Angel's Breath" restricted slot card
Episode 74: The "Mimic" spell card
Episode 75: Gon and Killua
